title_block.title: AI Glasses Carrier V1 (RK3576/CM4) — EVT
title_block.comment_3: P0: Camera MIPI-CSI | PDM Mic x2 | I2S Audio | USB-C | Wi-Fi/BT | Debug
title_block.comment_4: P1: 1S Li-Po | Fuel Gauge | IMU | Vibration

findings.description: Detected class_d audio amplifier IC U4.
Detected standalone cell protection IC U8 without paired charger.
IEC 62133 / UL 2054: Battery charging/management circuitry detected
UN 38.3: Lithium battery transport safety testing

findings.detail: J1: 6 signal pins per ground pin (recommended: ≤3 for EMI control)
findings.description: Connector J1 has 6.0 signal pins per ground pin.
findings.recommendation: Add more ground pins (target ≤3 signal pins per ground).

findings.detail: J31: 24 signal pins per ground pin (recommended: ≤3 for EMI control)
findings.description: Connector J31 has 24.0 signal pins per ground pin.
findings.recommendation: Add more ground pins (target ≤3 signal pins per ground).

findings.detail: J32: 16 signal pins per ground pin (recommended: ≤3 for EMI control)
findings.description: Connector J32 has 16.0 signal pins per ground pin.
findings.recommendation: Add more ground pins (target ≤3 signal pins per ground).

findings.recommendation: Set the MPN field on the listed parts and re-sync datasheets so every BOM entry has manufacturer evidence.

findings.summary: USB connector J4: D- (USB_DM) missing series resistor
findings.description: USB D- on J4 has no series resistor (typically 22R for USB 2.0).
findings.recommendation: Add a 22R series resistor on D- near the connector.

findings.summary: USB connector J4: D+ (USB_DP) missing series resistor
findings.description: USB D+ on J4 has no series resistor (typically 22R for USB 2.0).
findings.recommendation: Add a 22R series resistor on D+ near the connector.

findings.description: Power regulator (LDO) detected
Power regulator (LDO) detected
Power regulator (LDO) detected
Power regulator (switching) detected

findings.summary: U10 pin INT1 (IMU_INT1) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin INT1 on U10 (ICM-42688-P) is connected to net IMU_INT1 but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from IMU_INT1 to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin INT1 is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U11 pin EN (VIB_EN) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin EN on U11 (DRV2605L) is connected to net VIB_EN but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from VIB_EN to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin EN is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U14 pin RESET_N (GNSS_RST_n) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin RESET_N on U14 (MAX-M10S-00B-01) is connected to net GNSS_RST_n but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from GNSS_RST_n to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin RESET_N is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U3 pin EN (CAM_PWR_EN) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin EN on U3 (LP5907-3.3 (low-noise LDO)) is connected to net CAM_PWR_EN but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from CAM_PWR_EN to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin EN is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U7 pin INT (CHG_INT_n) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin INT on U7 (BQ25180) is connected to net CHG_INT_n but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from CHG_INT_n to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin INT is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.description: low-pass RC filter
Net +5V_SYS carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.description: Net VBAT_P carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.description: Net VBUS_PROT carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (0/47 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 0 of 47 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (0.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

manager.one_liner: 1 error, 8 warnings across 3 categories. Pre-fab stage has blockers.
